name: fluxion
title: fluxion
summary: security auditing and social-engineering research tool
description:
security auditing and social-engineering research tool
Fluxion is a security auditing and social-engineering research tool. It is a
remake of linset by vk496 with (hopefully) fewer bugs and more functionality.
The script attempts to retrieve the WPA/WPA2 key from a target access point by
means of a social engineering (phishing) attack. It's compatible with the
latest release of Kali (rolling). Fluxion's attacks' setup is mostly manual,
but experimental auto-mode handles some of the attacks' setup parameters. Read
the FAQ before requesting issues.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use fluxion because security auditing and social-engineering research tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use fluxion as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `fluxion  [-m]  [--auto]  [--scan-time  N  ]  [-l  language ] [-b bssid ] [-c channel ] [--band` as documented upstream for fluxion.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo ./fluxion.sh -m --scan-only --scan-time 60` as documented upstream for fluxion.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo ./fluxion.sh -m --scan-only --scan-time 30 -c 6` as documented upstream for fluxion.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sudo ./fluxion.sh --scan-only --scan-time 30 --band abg` as documented upstream for fluxion.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair fluxion with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `fluxion --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: fluxion - Fluxion is a security auditing and social-engineering research tool
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install fluxion. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sudo ./fluxion.sh -m --scan-only --scan-time 60`. Further invocations from upstream: `sudo ./fluxion.sh -m --scan-only --scan-time 30 -c 6`; `sudo ./fluxion.sh --scan-only --scan-time 30 --band abg`. security auditing and social-engineering research tool.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: security auditing and social-engineering research tool.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: fluxion - Fluxion is a security auditing and social-engineering research tool.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install fluxion
Install with: sudo apt install fluxion
